title: kv cache shape, H = 8192, 可以换下看是否性能有收益
raw_content:
kv cache shape, H = 8192, 可以换下看是否性能有收益
基础信息：
基于kernel ： Page_Attn_chunk_decode_ds_KVUMA
平台：br166
验证用例：
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, Test_Perf, false>(
0, 16, 1024, 4096, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 8, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, Test_Perf, false>(
0, 16, 128, 4096, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 8, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));



优化代码：
修改test中KV usharp shape，上述几个用例对应的KV usharp shape H轴是8192，尝试将H调整小于8192，避免撞上某个临界条件
当前吧8192调整成8192 - 256
image2025-11-17_16-34-32.png


性能数据：
image2025-11-17_16-33-56.png




结论：该优化点无性能收益

基础信息：

基于kernel ： Page_Attn_chunk_decode_ds_KVUMA

平台：br166

验证用例：

EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, Test_Perf, false>(
0, 16, 1024, 4096, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 8, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, Test_Perf, false>(
0, 16, 128, 4096, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 8, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));

 

 

优化代码：

修改test中KV usharp shape，上述几个用例对应的KV usharp shape H轴是8192，尝试将H调整小于8192，避免撞上某个临界条件

当前吧8192调整成8192 - 256

 

性能数据：

 

 

 

结论：该优化点无性能收益
